metadata.description: Claude Code and Codex skills for Threads (Meta) growth: single-post and multi-post thread writing, AI-tell humanizer with bundled pre-publish audit, viral hook extraction, reply and quote drafting, and weekly content planning. Posts and threads publish through the Publora API.

plugins.name: threads-skills
plugins.description: Bundle of 5 Threads (Meta) marketing skills for Claude Code and Codex with Threads-native hook formulas, single-post and multi-post thread writing, a unified humanizer (rewrite plus `--mode audit` pre-publish check), viral hook extraction, reply and quote drafting, and a weekly content planner. Posts and threads ship via Publora, which auto-splits long content into a connected multi-post thread.
